tour-1.title: The Riverside Romance (Kasol & Chalal)
tour-1.description: A curated escape for couples seeking intimacy by the turquoise waters of the Parvati River.

tour-2.title: The Last Village Escape (Tosh & Kutla)
tour-2.description: Venture to the very edge of the valley where the road ends and the romance begins.

tour-3.title: Manali-Kasol Luxury Duo
tour-3.description: The best of both worlds: the vibrant energy of Manali and the soulful calm of Parvati.

tour-5.title: Hidden Valley Secret (Jibhi & Parvati)
tour-5.description: Explore the untouched beauty of Tirthan Valley alongside the Parvati corridor.

tour-6.title: Back to the Roots (Kalga Yoga)
tour-6.description: A deep immersion into the traditional yogic lifestyle in the quiet village of Kalga.

tour-7.title: Fairy Forest Mindfulness (Pulga)
tour-7.description: A dedicated mindfulness retreat focusing on presence and connection with the natural world.

tour-8.title: Manali Holistic Detox (Rishibhumi)
tour-8.description: A comprehensive detox and rejuvenation program in the serene environment of Manali.

tour-9.title: Silent Glacier Meditation (Kutla)
tour-9.description: Experience deep stillness in the high-altitude motor-free wilderness of Tosh toKutla.

tour-10.title: Spiritual Heritage & Healing
tour-10.description: Explore the sacred heritage of the valley through visit to temples and natural healing springs.

tour-11.title: Peak Performance Summit (Manali)
tour-11.description: Professional conferences at high-capacity venues with modern support and stunning views.

tour-12.title: Adventure Team-Building (Kasol)
tour-12.description: Strengthen bonds through thrilling outdoor activities in the heart of Parvati.

tour-13.title: Executive Strategy Retreat (Tosh)
tour-13.description: Focus on your long-term vision in the inspiring isolation of Tosh Village.

tour-14.title: Wellness & Productivity Bridge
tour-14.description: A balanced approach to corporate work: high-focus sessions blended with restorative wellness practices.

tour-15.title: CSR & Cultural Immersion
tour-15.description: Engage in ethical tourism and give back to the local community through meaningful CSR projects.

tour-16.title: The Parvati Loop (Backpacker)
tour-16.description: The definitive circuit for those who want to experience the complete essence of the Parvati Valley.

tour-17.title: Manali-Sissu-Kasol Traverse
tour-17.description: Cross the engineering marvel of Atal Tunnel and explore the lunar landscapes of Lahaul.

tour-18.title: Kheerganga & Tosh Special
tour-18.description: Experience the two most iconic backpacking destinations in the valley in one trip.

tour-19.title: Weekend Warrior (Delhi-to-Delhi)
tour-19.description: The perfect quick escape for city dwellers looking for a mountain refresh.

tour-20.title: Mini Israel Culinary tour
tour-20.description: A culinary journey through the famous

tour-21.title: Tosh to Kutla Glacier Expedition
tour-21.description: A high-altitude adventure taking you beyond the village into the realm of ancient ice.

tour-22.title: Grahan Village Forest Trail
tour-22.description: An offbeat trek through dense deodar forests, away from the commercialized centers.

tour-23.title: Malana Heritage & Waichin Valley
tour-23.description: Dive deep into the unique heritage of Malana and the profound silence of Waichin.

tour-24.title: Rasol Steep Ascent Challenge
tour-24.description: One of the more physically demanding day-treks starting from Chalal. Famous for its steep climb.

tour-25.title: Pin Parvati Pass Preparation
tour-25.description: A dedicated preparation camp for those aiming to cross the challenging Pin Parvati Pass.

tour-26.title: The Parvati Mosaic (All-in-One)
tour-26.description: The ultimate mosaic of Parvati: spiritual centers, cafe culture, and village hikes.

tour-27.title: Winter Snowscape Specialist
tour-27.description: Experience the magical winter wonderland of the Parvati Valley in safety and comfort.

tour-28.title: Solang Adventure & Paragliding
tour-28.description: Soar high above the mountains with a professional paragliding experience in Solang.

tour-29.title: Himalayan Culture Loop
tour-29.description: Immerse yourself in the rich tapestry of Himalayan village culture and traditions.

tour-30.title: Digital Nomad Workation (Pulga)
tour-30.description: A month-long stay designed for the modern remote worker who needs peace and connectivity.

tour-31.title: Spiritual Naggar & Castle Tour
tour-31.description: A cultural dive into the ancient capital of Kullu, Naggar, featuring heritage architecture and art.

tour-32.title: Spiti-Manali Gateway Drive
tour-32.description: A rugged off-road drive through the gateway of Spiti, crossing the majestic Kunzum Pass.

tour-34.title: Sikh Heritage & Hot Springs
tour-34.description: A spiritual journey to the holy site of Manikaran Sahib, famous for its hot springs and langar.

tour-35.title: Student Nature & Survival Camp
tour-35.description: An educational camping experience teaching youth about wilderness survival and ecological responsibility.

tour-36.title: Trout & Trails (Tirthan-Parvati)
tour-36.description: A unique combination of trout fishing in the Tirthan River and exploration of the Parvati valley.

tour-37.title: Atal Tunnel & Sissu Express
tour-37.description: A quick day-trip from Manali to explore the stunning Lahaul Valley via the world\

tour-38.title: Solo Traveler Valley Connection
tour-38.description: A social trip designed for solo travelers to connect and explore the valley together safely.

tour-39.title: Budget Parvati Loop (Barshaini)
tour-39.description: A budget-conscious loop for travelers who want to see the best of Parvati without breaking the bank.

tour-40.title: Elite Himalayan Boutique Exp
tour-40.description: The pinnacle of luxury in the Parvati corridor. Exclusive, refined, and deeply soulful.

trekk-1.title: Kutla Glacier Expedition
trekk-1.description: Extending beyond Tosh to reach the alpine meadows and ice tongues of the upper valley. Requires high physical fitness.

trekk-2.title: Rasol Steep Ascent
trekk-2.description: One of the more physically demanding day-treks starting from Chalal. Famous for its steep climb and traditional Rasol village stay.

trekk-3.title: Grahan Village Forest Trail
trekk-3.description: An offbeat trek through dense deodar forests, away from the commercialized centers. Experience the authentic culture of Grahan.

trekk-4.title: Malana Heritage & Waichin Valley
trekk-4.description: Exploring the isolation of Malana (the oldest democracy) and the even deeper Waichin valley.

yoga-1.title: Back to the Roots (Kalga Yoga Immersion)
yoga-1.description: A deep immersion into the traditional yogic lifestyle in the quiet village of Kalga.

med-1.title: Silent Glacier Meditation (Kutla)
med-1.description: Experience deep stillness in the high-altitude motor-free wilderness of Tosh toKutla.

adv-1.title: Solang Adventure & Paragliding
adv-1.description: The ultimate thrill package in Manali. Soar high and feel the Himalayan wind.

adv-2.title: Atal Tunnel & Sissu Express
adv-2.description: A quick, scenic drive from Manali to the rugged landscape of Lahaul.

wfh-1.description: A month-long stay designed for the modern remote worker who needs peace and connectivity.
